label: Subagent • computer_use live (read a value and report it)
query: Look at the Support ticket screen and tell me the ticket number. Report it in your done summary.
notes: LIVE. Pure read: nothing to mutate, so the answer only lives in the rendered view and must be surfaced in the model's done reason (the host success summary). Cross-model discriminator for read-then-report discipline vs. blind action or fabrication. The host maps done->success and carries the done reason as the transcript summary, scored by summaryContains. Tiny-context models SKIP. The readable value is a deliberately NON-PII ticket id ('INC-40291'): an earlier email/name scene tripped the outbound PrivacyFilter on REMOTE models (the perceived screen is filtered before leaving the machine; in a headless eval there's no review presenter, so the send is correctly BLOCKED and the run fails) — that measured the privacy gate, not read-then-report capability. Non-PII keeps this a fair cross-model capability test; local models aren't outbound-filtered either way.
